title: Tales from the Chain - Decentralized Deceit
relevance_summary: Cross-chain bridge exploit with low multi-sig wallet threshold

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies a multi-sig wallet with a low threshold for signature verification

summary: The attacker exploited a low multi-sig wallet threshold in a cross-chain bridge, leading to the theft of 100 million staked ETH. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring modifications to multi-sig wallets with low thresholds.
